content:
Final Failure (True Death)
Permanent removal from Mastery Exam streak.
No path back—student must complete the final paper.


✅ Why This Works:
• Creates risk and reward.
• Ties literary themes into game structure.
• Forces students to analyze their failures.

📜 5. Final Class Event: The Olympian Games of Literature

📜 Final class competition structured like an ancient literary showdown.
✔ XP can be spent on “power-ups” to give competitive advantages.
✔ Mastery Exam Champions are the “Judges” of the event.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 121 (chunk 121/555)
